description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a modern design, featuring two sliding doors on the front. The doors are decorated with a scenic blue and white mountain landscape, adding an artistic touch to the otherwise minimalist structure. The cabinet stands on four short cylindrical metal legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top, sides, and back are plain and finished in a smooth, light gray color, contrasting with the vibrant artwork on the front. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with metal legs and possibly metal tracks for the sliding doors. There are no visible handles, and the doors likely open by sliding along a concealed track.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with sliding doors featuring a blue mountain landscape, supported by four metal legs and finished in light gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors with a blue mountain landscape design and four metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, smooth gray surface and two visible metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, smooth gray panel and four metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain gray surface and two metal legs visible.
